roa.docketEntryComment: Bench Warrant Recalled
Bench Warrant Issued
DEFT'S PC1473,7 MOTION VACATE CONVICTION FILED
ORDER SUSPENDING ACTIVE COLLECTIONS, GC 25259,7-25259,95
PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED
DEFT'S PC17(B) MOTION REDUCE CHARGE FILED
FELONY PLEA TX FILED

/CAL: MOTION TO VACATE PURSUANT TO PC1473,7; DA NON-OPP TO SET ASIDE/X: THE PEOPLE DO NOT OPPOSE PETITIONER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE GUILTY PLEA, ENTER A NOT GUILTY PLEA AND SET ASIDE THE CONVICTION AND SENTENCE OF DECEMBER20TH, 2013/MO GRTD/X: PLEA DATE:11-08-13/X: SENTENCE DATE:12-20-13/ /X:THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANT WAS NOT PROPERLY ADVISED OF THE POTENTIAL CONSEQUENCES OF A GUILTY PLEA, /CTORD: THE CONVICTION AND SENTENCE WERE ILLEGALAND INVALID,  PREJUDICIAL ERROR DAMAGED THE DEFENDANT,  ACCORDINGLY, THE GUILTY PLEA ENTERED ON 11-08-2013 IS SET ASIDE A NOT GUILTY PLEA IS ENTERED,THE SENTENCE ENTERED ON 12-20-2013 ARE HEREBY VACATED, /X: THERE BEING NONEW PLEA ENTERED, THE COURT ORDERS THE MATTER DISMISSED/MO PC 1385: INTEREST OF JUSTICE/X: ORDER SIGNED AND FILED/

/X DEF PC 17(B) MOTION TO REDUCE CHARGES;FOR SENTENCE TRANSCRIPT/INTC/XHE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT 2, HS 11377, AMISDEMEANOR, IS GRANTED,/FAWC/IRRC/  /X:PETITIONER WITHDRAWS GUILTY PLEA IN COUNT 1 AND PLEADS NOLO TO COUNT 2, ALL TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF PRIOR SENTENCE REMAIN THE SAME WITH THE EXCEPTION OF PROBATION,  FORMAL PROBATION ISCONVERTED TO COURT PROBATION,/
/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 2D/CTS:2/WS/DNACOMP/PF500 12/FORF5:$1,120/WS/11590/DTC/LFNEW/RX/VF4:280/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/MISD2:18/BE/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:1/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:12-02-13/REMA/ARBUCKLE/DOP/

/CAL:DEFENDANT MOTION TO RECALL BENCH WARRANT AND ARRAIGNMENT/INTORD:SPANISH/BWR:09-10-13/BWR1/BFSA:09-10-13/BAIL REIN/X:REASSIGNMENT OF LIABILITYON BAIL BOND FILED IN OPEN COURT/ /TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG//PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW60/LD: FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING IS 11-12-13/987,2/X:BAIL REMAINS AT $50,000/CONTD  PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
